reviews.review_title: This is a demo, not a complete movie.
reviews.review_description:
It was ok, but then ends abruptly...that's
 when u find out it's a part of a story...a short film.

The cam angles do induce some motion sickness.

If it was a normal length movie I'd give it 4 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback -  I will update the description to make it clear this is currently a 30 min film, Chapter 1 of 3. We are hoping to release Chapter 2 later this year, which will be longer. I hope you caught the Trailer at the end for upcoming Chapters. Currently we are the longest narrative 180 VR film on the store market (with Apple's "Submerged" VR film on Vision Pro only being 16mins long, and one part only).

Due to the difficulty and expense of making VR180 films above regular films, as an independent studio, we have had to stagger releases. Currently all the other narrative VR 180 films have been funded by Meta or Apple, while ours is self-financed. I hope you understand and thank you for indicating you would have given our film 4 stars otherwise.

reviews.review_title: Not eligible for a refund-Not recommend.
reviews.review_description: Got me motion sick within a minute, definitely NOT comfortable. Poor quality video. FYI, it’s sold as a game, but when it comes to getting a refund they treat it as a movie, and is not eligible for a refund. Oh well, it was only a couple of bucks.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry you did not enjoy the experience. Also we do not know why Meta did not allow you a refund, as we've specifically allowed this (as being under the  Narrative category) - We will contact Meta Store support and ask them to refund you

reviews.review_description: Sorry not sure what was trying to be achieved here. When the person says you feel part of movie it's only 3rd person. I thought it would be first person or at least somehow interactive. Am I missing something?

developer_response.body: Hi  - this is an Immersive cinema format or Immersive video experience, similar to the ones found on the Apple Vision Pro (Apple's"Submerged" Film and other Apple Immersive videos) or Meta's "The Faceless Lady" series (found on the Meta Horizon TV App along with other 360 and 180 video)... where the film is presented in VR 180 in a linear narrative form - more like an enhanced movie experience, but still passive. We are sorry you thought this was an interactive experience, please let us know if you need help with a refund in this regard.

reviews.review_description: It felt like this was 5.7k/30fps video, when it really needs to be 8k/60fps.  The acting wasn't great and the story didn't hold me.  It seemed more like and intro, with more story coming later.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback - we are sorry the story of this first chapter didn't fully work for you. The majority of the film  was shot with Z-Cams specially-modified at the factory by iZugar for 7.4K capture, and also custom 8K 180 camera rigs we built - however for a few of the more challenging shots we did use 5.7K cameras (eg the slow motion and aerial shots) and 6K for the 2D cinema insert elements.  Principal photography of this first chapter was completed before branded 8K 180 cameras were  commercially available (like the Canon R5C) - Chapter 1 first premiered at the FIVARS Festival Toronto in 2022. 
We have also updated the description to make clear this is a 30min Chapter 1 with more to come.  Currently the film is image-optimized for the Quest 2 and 3S displays, but we plan to update the app soon to provide even greater fidelity on the Quest 3 with optimised color.  Again thank you for the feedback and we hope you might still give Chapter 2 a try when it's released, which will improve on the visual quality even further.

reviews.review_title: Game changer - really hope to see more!
reviews.review_description: Didn't know what to expect... was blown away! Love the axe throwing scene - highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positve review! We love how the axe throwing scene turned out also!!

reviews.review_description: I thought this was a well developed plot and the acting was very good. Sequel please!!

developer_response.body: Thank you! We worked hard on the plot, and we're working on the sequels now!

reviews.review_description: I don’t usually write reviews but OH WOW THIS IS STUNNING!! It is extremely immersive, the acting is very well done and I am now super invested in what’s to come! I advice you to buy it because it is so worth it and when you finish it know that more is literally coming! I am so pleased with this purchase and the story gave me the chills and was genuinely inspiring as others mentioned in the reviews which is why I purchased it to begin with!! Super Matrix vibes and it is such a fun watch and it’s a little spooky too so it’s good for everyone! And PS ITS HD QUALITY!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we are trying to spread the word!

reviews.review_description: I wasn’t sure what to expect but what riveting story told through a fabulous new medium. I was able to explore the room with my eyes while watching and hearing the story unfold.  Well done! You’ve got to check this out.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! We are thrilled you enjoyed it!

reviews.review_description: Just awesome... same 180 format as Apple Immersive Video on Vision Pro. Best Scripted-Narrative 180 film I've seen so far, better even than Apple's films on VP.

I’ve been using VR for many years and it’s extremely rare that I’m uncomfortable in it but I could only take a minute or two of this before I had to quit.

Turning my head to look around felt very strange, like the app was rotating the view as if the axis of rotation was right between your eyes instead of your neck.

The performance was poor. The frame rate was unsteady and there was some blurring and ghosting. 

I’ve watched 3D 180 videos on my old Quest 2 that were comfortable to look around in and ran smoothly so I’m surprised to see these issues on my Quest 3.

Even though it’s only a few bucks I’m requesting a refund because I can’t watch any more of it without getting really sick.

developer_response.body: We are very sorry for this experience you had - the axis of rotation view should most definitely not be stuck between your eyes, and this would indeed be uncomfortable... additionally the frame rate problems also seem to indicate there has been a problem with the install,  or a problem with the headset running the app correctly. We will contact Meta Store Support to make sure your refund goes through.

reviews.review_description: As someone who uses VR to shoot 360 degree films, I always thought 180 degree films were always gonna be less immersive than a full 360 film, but The Talent Stealer changed my mind, and opened my eyes to how amazing a vr film can be with just the front field of view. The cast and crew went above and beyond to tell this amazing story in this incredible experimental medium that’ll leave you wanting to learn more about this world, and dive deeper into this story.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for this - we are so thrilled you enjoyed it and changed your mind on 180 VR narrative!

reviews.review_description: This movie inspires me and pumps me up to be my best self every time I watch it. It's like a super pill for my psyche. I really loved the cloud and flying sequences

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we are thrilled you enjoyed it, and the memory cloud flying sequences!

reviews.review_description: Great storyline! I like the xmen / matrix special powers. Can’t wait to see more! Favourite part / visual effect would have to be the armoured truck flip and how it was shot.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we hope you enjoy the full armoured truck flip scene in the upcoming chapters!

reviews.review_description: It was cooling watching a film that was more interactive than on a regular screen. I found it interesting to be in the film rather than simply viewing it.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the positive review - we are thrilled you enjoyed it, especially as your first time with this type of experience!

reviews.review_description: Enjoyed this!! There’s nothing else quite like it right now - looking forward to more 👏

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Our goal is to entertain the audience with a unique experience... we are so thrilled you enjoyed the movie!

reviews.review_description: This was the first time I felt like I was inside a movie, I reached out to touch stuff that wasn't there. I felt completely immersed... I can't wait for Chapter 2!!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we are thrilled you enjoyed it and that you felt completely immersed in this linear experience!

reviews.review_description: I love this, the storyline is really good, I can't wait for more. It's a new type of experience!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we are thrilled you enjoyed it and can't wait for more!

reviews.review_description: Really cool way of watching a new type of movie, very interesting storyline I liked the action - the visual quality is very clear too

developer_response.body: Thanks so much - we are thrilled you enjoyed the storyline and the visual quality!
